reference: My mother is seventy-three and has a heart problem, is diabetic, and suffers from high blood pressure. She had a fall two months ago, and luckily nothing was broken. After a month, she started suffering from shoulder pain. We have done an X-ray, and nothing is showing. Can you please suggest some remedies for treatment?
text: My mother is 73 and has a heart problem, she's diabetic and suffers from high blood pressure. She had a fall two months ago and luckily nothing was broken. After a month, she started suffering from shoulder pain. We have done an X-ray and nothing is showing. Can you please suggest some remedies for treatment?
